titleStmt.title: SII 28.287: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 287. (A.R. No. 441 of 1913.) ĀṞAGAḶŪR, ATTUR TALUK, SALEM DISTRICT.

summary.p: Kāmēśvara temple, second prākāra, east wall, left of entrance.

Records a royal order addressed to the tānattār of the temple of Tirukkāmīśvaramuḍaiya-nāyaṉar of Āṟagaḷūr in Āṟṟūr-kūṟṟam granting 3000 kuḻi of wet land that would be reclaimed after clearing, as tax-free (iṟai-ili) and including poṉvari and all such levies (āyam-income) as well as āḷ-amaiñji-tēvai (free labour or payment in lieu as was required to be tendered for the functioning of the village management) to serve as capital for the carrying out of the worship and for (periodical) maintenance of the deities Kulaśēkhara-āḷuḍaiyār and Vāḻvittamaṅgai (in shrines set up) in the temple of Tirukkāmīśvaram-uḍaiyanāyaṉar at Āṟagaḷūr in Āṟṟūr-kūṟṟam. The record was attested by •••• ṉ Gaṇapatiāḻvāṉ alias Kāḍuveṭṭi of Kappalūr alias Ulagāḷandachōḷa-nallūr in Muttūrkkūṟṟam in Pāṇḍi-maṇḍalam. The grant was to take effect from the dated cited above.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . Aruḷicceyal Āṟṟūrkkūṟṟattu Āṟakaḷūr Uṭaiyār tirukāmiśvaramuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyil tāṉattārkku Ikko
yil kulacekara Āḷuṭaiyārkkum vāḻvitta maṅkaiyarkkum pūcaikkum tiruppaṇikkum Uṭalāka Āṟṟūr nāṭṭil Eṉṉai vaḷatta
perumāṉukkuk kāṇiyākak kuṭutta teviyarkuṟucci naṉcey nilattile patiṉmuṉṟāvatu puraṭṭāti mātam mutal kāṭuveṭṭit tiruttum nilat
tile muvāyiraṅ kuḻi poṉvari Uḷḷiṭṭa Aṉaittāyaṅkaḷum Āḷamaiñci tevaiyum Uṭpaṭa Iṟaiyiliyākat tantom Ippaṭikku ca
ntirātittavarai celvatāka kallilum cempilum veṭṭi Iṟaiyiliyāka Aṉupavittup potuka Ivai pāṇṭi maṇṭalattu muttūrkkūṟṟattu
kkappalūrāṉa Ulakaḷanta coḻanallūr ṉ kaṇapati Āḻvāṉāṉa kāṭuveṭṭi Eḻuttu tiruveḻuttu tulyam §
Digital edition of SII 28.287 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
